programmes.show_description: Latest news from the world of entertainment.
Bond film starring Roger Moore and Jane Seymour, 1973. 007 is sent to New York to investigate a prime minister, a Harlem crime kingpin, and the death of three MI6 agents.
Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Ricochet, Chris Jericho, Kris Statlander, Darby Allin and Claudio Castagnoli.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.
Shopping from home.
Brian Moore hosts action from October 1977 and is joined by Alan Ball as Crystal Palace host Southampton, Leeds United take on Liverpool, and Wolverhampton Wanderers face West Ham.
Brian Moore presents football highlights from October 1977 featuring a trip to Watford as they take on Newport County, Brighton v Crystal Palace, and Blackpool v Luton Town.
Torah! Torah! Torah!: Classic US action drama series. Thomas probes the theft of a rare edition of the Jewish holy book the Torah and is aided by a policewoman chasing smugglers.
Bad Dude: Classic US detective drama. A private detective sets himself up as a potential target for a hired killer and does not take kindly to Theo's attempts to rescue him.
All in a Day's Pork: Classic drama. While Ken is hired to find out who has been taking Dictaphone tapes from a meat company, he also uncovers a plot to import pornographic material.
Bad Apple: When a convicted criminal grasses up a group of CID officers involved in bribery, Regan and Carter go undercover to investigate the corruption charges against them.
Set A Thief: Classic detective series. When a top model is murdered by a hit-and-run driver, Dempsey and Makepeace discover that she had connections at the highest levels.
A Pretty Good Dancing Chicken: Classic US action drama series. Thomas searches for a vengeful escaped prisoner who knows the whereabouts of Carol's missing cousin Becky.
A Grave Too Soon: Classic US detective drama. When an undercover detective is murdered, the investigation leads Theo to a Mafia boss out to avenge the death of his own sons.
The Eyes of Texas: Classic drama. Ken spends the night with Rebecca before going looking for her missing husband - however, things do not go according to plan when the man is found.
May: Classic '70s police series. Regan tries to help the son of an old friend when the boy is implicated in a brutal assault.
Sorry Pal, Wrong Number: Drama series about a loveable rogue. Arthur's new gambling venture involves Terry taking on the prestigious task of guarding three public telephone boxes.
Steptoe's Shed: Australian spin-off from the popular US documentary series. Lucas Callaghan and Adam McDonald head to Victoria to meet an auctioneer known to the locals as Steptoe.
Turn and Burn: Nail-biting documentary series. Tim Freeman incurs a misfortune after becoming lead driver, and Hugh Rowland's enthusiasm for trucking leads to a brush with the law.
Congo Killer: Jeremy Wade travels to the Congo - one of the few rivers left on the planet that will still test a fisherman - while on the trail of a terrifying legend.
Boxing drama film sequel starring Michael B Jordan and Tessa Thompson, 2023. Adonis Creed faces more than just a fight when a childhood friend and former boxing prodigy resurfaces.
Latest news from the world of entertainment.
Boxing drama film sequel starring Michael B Jordan and Tessa Thompson, 2023. Adonis Creed faces more than just a fight when a childhood friend and former boxing prodigy resurfaces.
Action from matches including Rennes v Toulouse, Monaco v Angers, Le Havre v PSG, Lille v Nantes, Lorient v Auxerre and Marseille v Lyon.
Winners Right the History Books: Thrilling spy drama. Berlin Station continues to search for the truth behind Katerina's assassination as a protest outside the US Embassy escalates.
The Dream Begins: US cooking competition. The 22nd series of the programme begins with contestants competing in the signature dish challenge after being divided into two teams.
This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.
Shopping from home.
Brian Moore talks to Sir Alf Ramsey and Trevor Francis in October 1977 alongside action from Arsenal v Birmingham City, Ipswich Town v West Ham, and Manchester City v Liverpool.
Action from November 1977 as Brian Clough's Nottingham Forest head to west London to face Chelsea, plus Middlesbrough v Queens Park Rangers and Derby County v Everton.
A Pretty Good Dancing Chicken: Classic US action drama series. Thomas searches for a vengeful escaped prisoner who knows the whereabouts of Carol's missing cousin Becky.
A Grave Too Soon: Classic US detective drama. When an undercover detective is murdered, the investigation leads Theo to a Mafia boss out to avenge the death of his own sons.
The Eyes of Texas: Classic drama. Ken spends the night with Rebecca before going looking for her missing husband - however, things do not go according to plan when the man is found.
See No Evil: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. Harry and Caroline are assigned to keep tabs on a senator who is investigating organised crime in Rome.
Pete Graves is joined by Wayne Mardle, Glen Durrant, and Chris Mason for coverage from Butlin's Minehead as the 2026 Ladbrokes UK Open, the FA Cup of darts, gets under way.
From Nijinsky to Tiger Roll, Ed Chamberlin introduces some of the great racehorses of the modern era - enjoy Best Mate's third Gold Cup and Shergar racing to Derby glory.
Alaskan Horror: Jeremy Wade goes deep into the forbidding Alaskan wilderness to visit two big lakes where legend says that people have been vanishing for hundreds of years from.
Military Madness: Australian spin-off from the popular US documentary series. Lucas Callaghan and Adam McDonald visit a huge collection of military items and vehicles near Melbourne.
Pete Graves is joined by Wayne Mardle, Glen Durrant, and Chris Mason as the 2026 Ladbrokes UK Open continues at Butlin's Minehead with the beginning of the fourth round.
